title: [codereview-p2 pass1] select_channel_timing description update matches pseudocode but missing explicit test cases for all branches (blacklist, dwell, switch interval)
description: File: test/vectors/generate.py:1638. The updated description references the pseudocode but the single test case does not provide inputs for blacklist_until[], last_used[], last_switch_ts, full per-channel SNR/PER to exercise score := (1-busy)*success*20 + hysteresis and IF dwell < MIN_DWELL_MS. Add 6-8 dedicated vectors for full branch coverage before closing hw6w. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-stvs
close_reason: Added 8 dedicated test vectors exercising all branches in select_channel_timing (blacklist, dwell < MIN_DWELL_MS, hysteresis, SNR/PER combos); full branch coverage confirmed via generator and pytest
